name: Process Baselining: Process Name to Hash
notes: Enable this rule to create a baseline for process names found in your environment and their corresponding hashes.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
TD_list: APPLY Process Baselining: Process Name to Hash on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
RED_list: Add the "Process Name" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "ProcessNametoHashRefMapOfSetKeys"
Add "File Hash" to Reference Map Of Sets: "ProcessNametoHash" with key "Process Name"
